title: Subquery
description: Menggunakan subquery (query dalam query) di MySQL.

commands.name: scalar-subquery
commands.title: Scalar Subquery
commands.syntax: SELECT kolom, (SELECT ...) AS alias FROM tabel;

commands.name: in-subquery
commands.title: IN Subquery
commands.description: Subquery dalam klausa IN untuk filter berdasarkan daftar nilai.

commands.name: exists-subquery
commands.title: EXISTS Subquery
commands.notes: EXISTS biasanya lebih efisien daripada IN untuk subquery besar.

commands.name: derived-table
commands.title: Derived Table (FROM Subquery)
commands.description: Subquery di klausa FROM sebagai tabel sementara.

commands.name: correlated-subquery
commands.title: Correlated Subquery
commands.description: Subquery yang mereferensikan tabel di query luar.
commands.syntax: SELECT ... WHERE kolom op (SELECT ... WHERE inner.col = outer.col);
commands.notes: Correlated subquery dijalankan untuk setiap baris di query luar — bisa lambat untuk dataset besar.
